title: Brand New: GUI
body:
### IMPORTANT:
This Texture Pack is a **work in progress**. **Everything can be changed**

My goal is to give more style and personality to Minecraft's UI since it is really outdated and, in my opinion, doesn't look that great but can be improved.

### You can see other things I do here:
[My socials](https://dhudizi.carrd.co/)
